message.content:
@startuml
actor "User Agent" as UA
participant "Content Upload API" as API
database "Content database" as DB
participant "CAFF Parser" as Parser

UA -> API: Upload request (HTTP POST),\ncontains a single CAFF file in its body.
note right of API: **MUST** also include a CSRF token to prevent users of other,\npotentially XSS vulnerable sites to take part in a massive distributed spam or DoS operation.
activate API
API -> Parser: Validate upload request
activate Parser
Parser --> API: Return result
deactivate Parser

alt [Failed to validate uploaded content]
    API --> UA: Return an HTTP status code that signals validation failure.\nExact value depends on how the validation failed.
else [Request is deemed valid]
    note right of Parser: Uploads should be validated by at **LEAST**:\n* Content-Size header against max file size.\n* All size fields against their respective supported bounds.\n* Structure of all fields match expectations from the spec.\n* Number of bytes from the upload matches number of bytes expected from in-file metadata.
    API -> DB: Store content in database
    activate DB
    DB --> API: Return result of request
    deactivate DB
    alt [Upload succeeded]
        API --> UA: Return HTTP 201 Created
    else
        API --> UA: Return HTTP status code signaling the reason for failure.
    end
end
deactivate API
@enduml
